name: pdv-margin-engine-agente
description: Agente local PDV Margin Engine — impressora térmica, ACBr, fila offline e servidor do frontend

scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test LOG_SILENT=true LOG_PATCH_CONSOLE=false sh -c 'node test/directory-manager.test.js && node test/logging-service.test.js && node test/installer-diagnostic.test.js && node test/fila-venda.test.js && node test/fiscal-driver.test.js && node test/api-proxy.test.js && node test/spa-fallback.test.js && node test/boot-guards.test.js && node test/contract.test.js && node test/acbr-resposta.test.js && node test/fiscal-hardening.test.js'
scripts.test:integration: node test/fiscal-production.test.js && node test/agent-config-sync.test.js && node test/fiscal-local-config.test.js && node test/fiscal-setup.test.js && node test/fiscal-evento.test.js && node test/fiscal-ini-policy.test.js && node test/nfe-validacao.test.js && node test/documentos-xml.test.js
scripts.test:agent-fiscal: node test/fiscal-driver.test.js && node test/acbr-provider-parity.test.js && node test/acbr-lib-solid.test.js && node test/fiscal-local-config.test.js && node test/fiscal-setup.test.js && node test/fiscal-evento.test.js && node test/acbr-resposta.test.js && node test/contract.test.js
scripts.test:print: node test/print-provider.test.js && node test/printer-local-config.test.js && node test/print-extended.test.js && node test/thermal-text.test.js && node scripts/print-benchmark.js
scripts.test:agent-print: node test/print-provider.test.js && node test/printer-local-config.test.js && node test/print-extended.test.js && node test/thermal-text.test.js && node scripts/print-benchmark.js
scripts.test:full: npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:chaos && npm run test:agent-fiscal && npm run test:agent-print
